The paper exists at arXiv:2412.14642 with the exact cited title and author list. The automated checker's "title mismatch" (pointing to "Speak-to-Structure") refers to a different paper at the same arXiv ID in a later version, but the v1 page clearly shows the cited title and authors (Jiatong Li, Junxian Li, Yunqing Liu, Dongzhan Zhou, Qing Li), exactly as cited. The GitHub repository's BibTeX entry also confirms these five authors.

EXPLANATION: The paper "TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-based Open Molecule Generation" exists at arXiv:2412.14642 with the exact cited title and the five cited authors, confirmed by the arXiv HTML page, Hugging Face, ResearchGate, and the official GitHub repository's BibTeX citation.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14642
